releases.title: collectZ v3.4.126
releases.summary: This patch lets collectZ automatically process queued Plex `library.new` webhook import hints on a lightweight backend cadence.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.125
releases.summary: This patch processes queued Plex `library.new` webhook import hints by fetching the single PMS metadata item and running it through the existing Plex import path.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.124
releases.summary: This patch lets Plex `library.new` webhooks create a safe import hint job without silently running a full Plex import.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.123
releases.summary: This patch adds Plex webhook receiver administration. Admins can generate, rotate, and revoke a receiver URL for Plex webhooks while the receiver remains contract-only.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.122
releases.summary: This patch adds the first Plex webhook and ratings sync contract. It does not enable automatic Plex webhook ingestion yet; it defines and proves the safe event/readback/writeback shape first.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.121
releases.summary: This release adds a vertical poster-only layout option for Plex Now Playing displays. It keeps the existing saved display preferences and display-token flow intact while giving passive screens a clean full-height poster mode.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.120
releases.summary: This release adds saved Plex Now Playing display preferences. Admins can tune the passive display surface for `/now-playing` and display-token links without changing Plex imports, webhooks, scheduled sync, or watch-state behavior.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.119
releases.summary: This release adds a revocable Plex Now Playing display link. Admins can generate a limited token for `/now-playing?token=...` so a passive display can show the sanitized Plex Now Playing viewer without an admin browser session.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.118
releases.summary: This release adds a standalone Plex Now Playing page. Authenticated admins can open `/now-playing` for a passive display view backed by the saved Plex now-playing readback and an app-owned image proxy.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added the `/now-playing` frontend route outside the dashboard shell.
Added a read-only backend viewer endpoint for sanitized active-session display data.
Added an authenticated Plex image proxy for Plex-relative poster/art keys.
Shows current title, show/season context, player state/platform, progress, and poster/art when Plex exposes usable image keys.
Added empty and unavailable states for no active sessions or unreachable Plex settings.

releases.title: collectZ v3.4.117
releases.summary: This release adds a real Plex PMS now-playing proof path. collectZ can now use saved Plex settings from the running stack to probe `/status/sessions` and write secret-free evidence about what a future Now Playing viewer can rely on.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added a backend proof script for saved real Plex now-playing readback.
Captured viewer-readiness field coverage for active sessions, including progress, player state, Plex-relative poster/art key availability, and queue-presence hints.
Extended sanitized now-playing session readback with Plex-relative `metadataKey`, `thumbKey`, `artKey`, and `hasQueueItem` fields.
Kept the proof read-only and separate from imports, webhooks, scheduled sync, watch-state writes, and the dedicated viewer.
